name: Raijinmon

signature_move.name: Giant Missile
signature_move.description: Fires intense lightning from its shoulders into its surroundings.

description: A Cyborg Digimon bestowed with the name of the Raijin of Oriental folklore. A fighting-type that is strong in close combat, its Signature Move is " Blitz Arm ", in which it dishes out a barrage of punches with the same lightning-type arm as Justimon . Its Special Move is charging with the connector on its tail, and firing intense lightning from its shoulders into its surroundings ( Elekugel ).
